text: I'm really confused! How often do you bill for the pro plan? I thought it was monthly but it feels like it's yearly. Can you clarify?
I can't log in anymore, it keeps saying wrong password. And my cat just knocked over my coffee. Help?
I was wondering if there are any specific features or updates planned for the next version of the app that you could share? I’m particularly interested in enhancements for user experience.
I thought I ordered a size medium but got small instead! Can you just refund me? I don’t want store credit.

Hi there! I recently switched phones and now I can’t access my account because it keeps saying that my credentials are incorrect. I thought everything would just transfer over seamlessly, but it seems like I need to do something different. I remember setting up some security questions and stuff, but I can't find that info now. Can you help me out? Thanks!
Could you please clarify if the premium subscription includes access to all features? I've heard conflicting information.
Hey, so I tried to log into my acccount but it keeps saying my password is wrong, even tho I just reset it like two days ago. Can you please help me figure this out? I'm not sure what's going on.
I received a damaged item and I'm really unhappy about it.
hey, I ordered a pair of shoes but got sent the wrong size and it's kinda messed up my plans. can I get a refund or something?
I'm really upset! I can't log in to my account, it just says wrong password even though I'm sure it's right. Please help!

I've been trying to get help with my order and it's been so frustrating! My order was supposed to arrive last week and I'm still waiting. I really expected better service, honestly. Can someone please give me an update? It's getting ridiculous.

I am extremely frustrated with the service I have received recently. I have reached out multiple times about my issue, yet there seems to be no resolution in sight. This level of support is simply unacceptable, and I would like to escalate this matter to a supervisor. Please respond at your earliest convenience.
I got this shirt and it's not the right color! Can I get my money back? Also, my dog chewed the tag. What's up with that?
I am unable to access my account despite entering the correct password. However, I believe I might have forgotten it. Can you assist me with this issue?
I need to return this, it's not what I expected.

I can't believe what just happened! I ordered a new phone and it arrived with a cracked screen, and I've tried to get help but nothing seems to be working. I've sent multiple emails and even called, but no one is really listening. This is by far the most frustrating experience I've ever had with any company, and I really just want someone to take this seriously and resolve it. It's unacceptable that I have to deal with this after all the money I spent. Can someone please help me?!
